user.title: B-Hyve account
user.description: Sign in with your Orbit B-Hyve cloud account. The integration uses cloud only at setup time to fetch device IDs and network keys, then talks to each timer over BLE — no cloud round trip after setup.

pick_devices.title: Discovered devices
pick_devices.description: Found {count} device(s). Uncheck any you don't want HA to manage.

reauth_confirm.title: B-Hyve — re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your saved Orbit credentials no longer authenticate. Enter the password again.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Orbit cloud API. Check your network connection.
error.no_devices: Login succeeded but no devices were found on this account.

start_watering.name: Start watering
start_watering.description: Start watering on a specific zone for a given duration.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: How long to water, in seconds.

stop_all.name: Stop all
stop_all.description: Stop all watering on the targeted device.

refresh_devices.name: Refresh devices from cloud
refresh_devices.description: Re-query the Orbit cloud for new/changed devices and updated network keys.
